历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science/physics category were approximately 11979 → 21301 → 13117 → 17775 → 27533, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 14416 places in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is about 27533; provincial science/physics category enrollment plans were 120 in 2021, 121 in 2022, 126 in 2023, 124 in 2024, and 128 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 127, a slight decrease of 1 compared to 2025, indicating a minor reduction in enrollment and slightly intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 89th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with stable rankings in the 84–92 range in recent years; no incidents related to Chang'an University appeared in reputation files or abnormal admission files, indicating a stable reputation; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 83rd (rated as 'average'), with low attention on short video platforms, creating no additional driving force for applications; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Transportation Engineering received an A-, the only A- or above discipline at the university, highly related to enrollment majors such as road and bridge engineering and traffic engineering, providing some attraction for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular majors such as Computer Science, Electrical Engineering and Automation, and Automation have consistently high rankings (approximately 6933–9017 in 2025), while traditional majors like Civil Engineering and Surveying and Mapping have lower rankings (approximately 27533), showing clear differentiation; the number of physics category candidates in the province for 2026 is about 264,000, an increase of about 1.5% compared to 2025, slightly intensifying competition; Chang'an University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi, in the northwest region, and Guangxi candidates generally have average regional preference for western universities, with no significant positive or negative effects.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 27533, a slight reduction in enrollment in 2026 (127 vs 128), and a small increase in provincial physics category candidates, competition is slightly intensified; additionally, the university's reputation is stable and Douyin popularity is average, with no additional driving factors. The predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 27454, with a range of 26954–27954.

If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 26000), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors; if your ranking is close to the upper limit (e.g., after 27800), it is advisable to mainly rely on Tier 3 majors for safety.
